dailyNews.title: Larger House Not Always Effective: Karti Chidambaram On More Lok Sabha Seats
dailyNews.description: "We will become like the chamber in North Korea or the People's Congress of China, where we will simply come and thump our desks and go away," Karti Chidambaram said

dailyNews.description: The phase for the event in the United States, Mexico and Canada involves more than 3 million tickets.

dailyNews.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Could Launch Largest-Ever Stock Market Listing: Report
dailyNews.description: The Starbase, Texas-headquartered firm could seek to raise more than $50 billion in the IPO, handily surpassing the 2019 flotation of Saudi Aramco, which remains the largest IPO on record.

dailyNews.description: Leonardo da Vinci’s timeless words connect art with science, reminding us that creativity thrives when passion, observation and purpose come together.

dailyNews.description: Artemis II launch: Canada will script history when Canadian Space Agency (CSA) astronaut Jeremy Hansen becomes the first Canadian – and first non-American – to ever participate in a lunar mission.

dailyNews.title: North Korea-linked hackers breach Axios software to target US firms; crypto theft feared: Report
dailyNews.description: Suspected North Korean hackers breached the open-source Axios package, pushing malicious updates to many US firms. Experts warn of a prolonged campaign to steal crypto funds. Dozens of devices are already compromised, with wider impact expected across industries.

dailyNews.title: Reporter kidnapped in Baghdad known for pursuing gutsy, low-budget assignments while living ‘frugal existence’
dailyNews.description: Award-winning American journalist Shelly Kittleson has been kidnapped in Iraq after brushing off threats that coincided with her coverage.

dailyNews.description: Golf influencer Paige Spiranac posted words of encouragement for Tiger Woods after his DUI arrest last week, saying "we are all rooting for Tiger."

dailyNews.description: Rare Character's hot dog-themed bourbon, inspired by Costco's iconic $1.50 combo, reportedly sold out in hours at a D.C. Costco, priced at $85.99.

dailyNews.description: A “Virginia father" charged with beating his infant daughter to death is an illegal immigrant let into the country under the Biden administration, according to DHS.

dailyNews.description: Trump says he expects the U.S. war with Iran to end within several weeks despite unrelenting attacks from both sides and Iran's iron grip on the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump's address on Iran war tonight will lay out timeframe for ending conflict
dailyNews.description: President Trump is updating the nation on U.S. operations in Iran as he threatens to withdraw from NATO.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he may withdraw U.S. from NATO. The law says he can't without Congress.
dailyNews.description: President Trump says he's considering withdrawing the U.S. from NATO, following years of complaining about the alliance.

dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday appeared open to invalidating President Trump's executive order that would end birthright citizenship.

dailyNews.title: Judge rules Trump cutting off funding for NPR and PBS is unconstitutional
dailyNews.description: U.S. District Judge Randolph Moss blocked the Trump administration from enforcing provisions of his executive order that directed federal agencies to cut off funding to NPR and PBS.

dailyNews.title: President Trump's 2026 State of the Union Address and the Democratic response
dailyNews.description: President Trump delivers the longest State of the Union address in recent history, followed by the Democratic response from Virginia Governor Abigail Spanberger.
